title: Match ID Type
description: Identifier types for audience match reporting. Combines hashed PII types (from audience-member.json field names) with universal ID types (from uid-type.json).

enumDescriptions.hashed_email: SHA-256 hashed email address (matches audience-member.hashed_email). Pseudonymous PII, not anonymous — unsalted SHA-256 of the email namespace is recoverable via precomputed dictionaries; treat as PII. See docs/reference/privacy-considerations#unsalted-hashed-identifiers-are-pseudonymous-not-anonymous.
enumDescriptions.hashed_phone: SHA-256 hashed phone number in E.164 format (matches audience-member.hashed_phone). Pseudonymous PII, not anonymous — unsalted SHA-256 of the E.164 namespace is recoverable via precomputed dictionaries; treat as PII. See docs/reference/privacy-considerations#unsalted-hashed-identifiers-are-pseudonymous-not-anonymous.
enumDescriptions.pairid: Publisher Addressable Identity via IAB Tech Lab PAIR protocol
